content.en:
Ye Tian is taking the fourth path, and when he hits the second balance, he needs to break through the reincarnation Haotian Origin, the reincarnation Haotian Body, and the Origin Realm Will together, so that he can complete the breakthrough of the second balance.

Subsequently, he began to take the three-source secret medicine to make a breakthrough.

However, he soon discovered that the grade of the three-source secret medicine was not good, and the chance of using the three-source secret medicine to break through was too low.

"It must be improved, otherwise even if you use a large number of copies of the body to try to break through again and again this time, and finally succeed, but if you hit the third balance next time, the three-source secret medicine will be completely useless!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He was ready to perfect the three-source secret medicine.

In the following years, he tried to improve the three-source secret medicine again and again, mainly by adding other resources and changing materials, so that there was hope to improve the three-source secret medicine.

In the end, he found that the Nine Tribulations Blood Plant Vine could be added to it as the main ingredient of the three-source secret medicine, so that the three-source secret medicine produced would have a high effect.

Really.

He used the newly researched three-source secret medicine to hit the second balance, and he easily broke through.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's Reincarnation Haotian Body, Reincarnation Haotian Origin, and Origin Realm Will are all improving wildly, and their strength is also greatly improving.

After a long time, he successfully completed the second balance, and his cultivation was also stable, and his strength was much stronger than before.

With his current strength, it is estimated that he is even stronger than the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has completed five awakenings.

However, this strength is still not strong, not to mention compared to those ancient Origin Upper Realm overlords, even compared to some of the current top Origin Upper Realm overlords, it is still a lot weaker.

However, if he uses the Reincarnation Arcana Spear, he should be able to fight against the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has completed the six awakenings, and he will not fall into disadvantage.

Of course.

He won't expose the reincarnation treasure now, the value of a reincarnation treasure is too high, and it can be taken away.

If he exposes the Reincarnation Arcana, maybe even the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has completed the seven awakenings will come to snatch it, in that case, he will not be able to keep the Reincarnation Arcana!

......

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's son, Ye Xingchen, finally completed the accumulation of the Origin Middle Realm level, and broke through to the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor Realm in a perfect way, becoming another Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor on Wind Tooth Island.

And Ye Tian is also very good to Wind Tooth Island, and has taken out a lot of resources to Wind Tooth Island, so that Wind Tooth Island can cultivate more Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

After all, with the resource wealth he has now, pulling out a little bit of treasure is an unimaginable resource on Fengya Island.

Thereupon.

With Ye Tian's help, there were naturally more and more Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors on Wind Tooth Island.

Another 10,000,000 years have passed.

At this time, Fengya Island already had twelve Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, plus Ye Tian, that is, the combat power of thirteen Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors or above.

Compared to when Ye Tian had not yet joined Wind Tooth Island, Wind Tooth Island only had three Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and his current strength far surpassed that of the past.

Wind Tooth Island is now strong, but its territory is small, there is not enough territory, and there is no way to recruit more geniuses from the other side, and the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm cannot be self-sufficient.

They can't always rely on Ye Tian to raise it alone, so they have to occupy more land and treasure land!

"We have to move to the middle of the land beyond eternity!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Not only did he have such thoughts, but those Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Wind Tooth Island also had such thoughts.

this day.

The opening of the meeting on Fengya Island is to discuss this matter.

meeting.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth said: "Endless Lord, although the territory in the middle of the Eternal Shore Land has been occupied, it is difficult for us in the Wind Tooth Island to occupy the territory. However, according to the information we know, the Northern Ancestor of the Beifeng Family has fallen, and the Beifeng Family is the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and with the fall of the Beizu Family, the life of the Beifeng Family is not very good. The Beifeng family already occupies a lot of territory and treasure land, and there are also many enemies, and it has always relied on the deterrence of the Beifeng family to make those forces dissatisfied with the Beifeng family dare not make a move. But now, the Beifeng family is in a lot of trouble, and just relying on their twenty or so Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors can't solve the problem at all. "

"Beizu!"

Ye Tian knew that this Origin Upper Realm Overlord was one of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords who fell into it when he was exploring the Origin Ancestor Treasure Land World.

Last time, not only did such a Origin Upper Realm overlord die, but after those few fell, the strength of the forces behind them plummeted.

But.

For the entire Eternal Beyond Land, the fall of a few Origin Upper Realm Overlords does not affect anything, after all, the resources obtained last time are estimated to allow some forces to cultivate Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

Maybe the number of Origin Upper Realm Overlords born later will increase.

But the Beifeng family is such a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, once it falls, the entire Beifeng family is almost not far from collapse.

"The Beifeng family should occupy three domains, and there are many treasures, so you can fight their ideas when the time comes!" Ye Tian agreed.

Seeing that Ye Tian agreed, the other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors naturally agreed.

After all, Fengya Island is now relying on Ye Tian, otherwise, they wouldn't dare to fight the idea of the Beifeng family!

Then.

The Lord of Wind Fang said again: "Lord of Endless, the Beifeng family is said to have been targeted by six top forces, and they will break out at any time. We can take advantage of the fire to loot and occupy their territory in the name of protecting the Beifeng family. "

"No problem, you can arrange it!"

Ye Tiandao.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Wind Fang travels to the middle of the Eternal Lands to visit the House of the Northern Front.

If it was before, a force like the Beifeng family would naturally look down on the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor like the Lord of the Wind Fang, and even the Wind Tooth Island would not be in the eyes of the Beifeng Family!

But now, the Beifeng family does not dare to offend the Lord of the Wind Teeth.

......

The Beifeng family, the conference hall.

The Lord of the Wind Tooth saw a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Beifeng Family, among which there were many top-level Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, whose strength was much stronger than him, but he was not afraid at all.

"Lord of Wind Fangs, I don't know what happened to my Beifeng family?"

The head of Beitang, the current family of the Beifeng family, asked.

"The lord of Beitang, I am representing Fengya Island, and I want to negotiate a business with the Beifeng family. The Lord of the Windfangs smiled.

"What business?" the Lord of Beitang seemed to feel that something was wrong.

Then.

The Lord of Wind Tooth said: "The situation of the Beifeng Family is not good now, our Fengya Island can protect the Beifeng Family, and no one will deal with you, but you need to pay a little price." "
